hero.title: Practical guides for buying, shipping, forwarding, and sourcing from China.
hero.description: Use the CNSnap blog to understand agent workflows, route estimation, restricted items, and parcel handling before you start a live purchasing flow.

sections.latestDesc: Fresh blog entries that can already work independently from the future landing-page module.

sections.topicsDesc: Start from the topic that matches your next workflow.

topicCards.description: Open a dedicated topic hub with published SEO articles and service-oriented CTA paths.

taxonomy.needWorkflowDescription: Move from category guides into product search, shipping estimation, DIY order, or forwarding.
